summary: Director Mission Control Refinement Testing Complete. All backend tests (14/14) passed. Frontend verification shows all required sections rendering correctly with proper section order. AI Brief generates leadership summaries (paragraph text, no task lists).

issues: TEST_REFACTOR Event text in alerts - appears to be test data showing in production

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: coachHealth correctly filters to only show coaches with assigned athletes
Backend: recruitingSignals pulls from event_notes and recommendations collections with weekly aggregation
Backend: AI briefing prompt updated to generate leadership summaries (no task lists)
Backend: programActivity correctly limited to 6 items
Frontend: All 7 Director MC sections render in correct order (Overview > Brief > Attention > Coach Health > Events > Signals + Activity)
Frontend: Quick action buttons (View, Nudge) appear on Needs Attention items
Frontend: Coach Health shows status dots (active/inactive/activating), athlete counts, activity info
Frontend: Upcoming Events shows simplified day labels (Tomorrow, 3 days, 1 week) and readiness percentages
Frontend: Recruiting Signals shows school interests, recommendations, coach notes counts
Frontend: Coach MC unchanged - still works correctly with todays_summary, myRoster
context_for_next_testing_agent: Director MC Refinement fully verified. Key endpoint: GET /api/mission-control returns coachHealth array and recruitingSignals object for directors. coachHealth contains: id, name, status, athleteCount, daysInactive, onboardingProgress, profileCompleteness. recruitingSignals contains: schoolInterests, hotInterests, warmInterests, newRecommendations, coachNotes. POST /api/ai/briefing generates leadership summaries (paragraph text, no numbered lists). Director Frontend sections in order: 1) Program Overview hero (5 KPIs: Athletes, Coaches, Need Attention, Events Ahead, Unassigned), 2) AI Program Brief (Generate button, shows paragraph text), 3) Needs Attention (quick action buttons: View, Nudge/Assign Coach), 4) Coach Health (status dots, athlete counts, activity), 5) Upcoming Events (simplified day labels, readiness %), 6) Recruiting Signals (school interests, recommendations, notes), 7) Program Activity (max 6 items). Data-testids: director-mission-control, director-hero, ai-program-brief, ai-brief-generate, ai-brief-content, needs-attention-card, quick-action-view, quick-action-nudge, coach-health-card, upcoming-events-card, recruiting-signals-card, activity-feed. Coach MC unchanged with todays-actions-card and my-roster-card.
